title: 恐怖！　お守り奪取ダッシュ

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Tee-hee! ♪ I've got me the good stuff! Nothing to
worry about with this lucky charm on hand...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, hold up! If memory serves, there's a
mischievous cat lurking around here. I need to
keep this safe so it doesn't get stolen...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You little devil! Get back here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only does Matikanefukukitaru fail to retrieve
her charm, but she walks away from the ordeal
completely exhausted.
